title: erythroxylum zeylanicum
intro: Erythroxylum zeylanicum, also known as Ceylon cocaine plant or Indian coca, is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae, native to Sri Lanka and India, and is a relative of the coca plant. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a local anesthetic, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. The health benefits of Erythroxylum zeylanicum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and promote wound healing. Erythroxylum zeylanicum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
